title: Eyeglasss Sunglass Glasses Spectacles Repair Tool Kit Set, with Mini Screwdriver, Screws Nut, Silicone Nose Pads, Glasses Cloth, Tweezer - 500 Pcs
features: 【Outstanding Material】These screws nuts are made of high-quality stainless steel, which are non-rust, hard, long service life. The nose pad and ear hook are made of silicone, which are more comfortable, and durable for long time use.

【Glasses Repair Tool Kit】Our sunglasses screws tools set has various types of screws, silicone nose pads, ear hook, plastic tweezer, micro screwdriver and fiber glasses cloth. It's a good accessory for repairing eyeglasses and sunglasses etc.

【Various Screws】The sunglasses repair kit has various screws, which can fix nose pads, temples, rimless glasses, glasses hinges and so on. The screws can also be used for clocks, watches and other items that require small screws.

【Easy to Store】Our sunglasses screwdriver repair kit is packed in a transparent plastic box, easy to see the location of all the things. The compact and portable design of the repair tools & kits will bring your more convenience.

【Widely Use】This eyeglasses repair tool kit is suitable for sunglasses, rimless glasses, semi-rimless glasses and frame glasses. The spectacle repair tools are complete, and you can easily fix the glasses by yourself.
description: Glasses Repair Tool Kit Specifications: - Material: Plastic, Stainless Steel, Aluminum Steel - Color: Silver, Transparent - Quantity: 500 Pcs - Size: As Pictures Shown Feature - Our repair screws set is made of stainless steel and silicone, non-rust, hard, long service life, comfortable. The fit rate of various screws reaches 99%. - This glasses repair kit includes a variety of different sizes of micro screws and nuts, for repairing nose pad, eyeglasses frame, and legs or other parts. - Glasses screwdriver has four functions, which can be used to tighten screws or nuts. It's a good accessory for repairing eyeglasses and sunglasses etc. - Screwdriver can easily remove tiny screws from the glasses and meet your general eyeglasses and watches repair works. With a key chain, it's portable and easy to hang. - The eyeglass repair kit with nose pads also accompany with a multi-function eyeglasses screwdriver with keychain for easy carry, a tweezers to pick up small parts, a pieces of glasses cloth to clean glasses and a box to storage. Package Includes: 1x 4 in 1 Screwdriver 1x Pair of Silicone Ear Pads 10x Pairs of Nose pad (screw-on) 10x Pairs of Nose Pads Nut Many kinds of Screws(Model as Shown) Friendly Reminder - Please keep the product out of the reach of children. Small items, do not play with children to avoid swallowing them by mistake. - When the nose pad turns yellow or blue, please replace it in time. - When using the glasses cloth, it is recommended to wipe the lens horizontally. Do not make a circular motion to avoid scratching the lens.
